# Pricing Model (BCD) — STRATOSYNC v2.6

## Principles
- Price to decision value (avoid “tool pricing”)
- Tier by governance/audit depth and number of projects
- Evidence bundle and override controls are enterprise-grade features

## Tiers (recommended)
### 1) PRO (Enterprise project teams) — ¥380,000 / month
- Up to 10 projects
- API access + dashboard
- Basic audit logs (hash chain)
- Standard thresholds + weights tuning
- Email/Slack export templates (spec)

### 2) INSTITUTIONAL (Funds / politically exposed operators) — ¥980,000 / month
- Up to 50 projects OR 1 fund with portfolio views
- Full audit trace matrix export
- Governance overrides with approval workflow (policy)
- Δ/S trend analytics pack
- Quarterly model review

### 3) SOVEREIGN-READY (highest compliance posture) — ¥2,400,000 / month
- Unlimited projects (by agreement)
- Compliance mapping pack + evidence bundle SOP
- Jurisdiction notes + ratification interfaces (institutional layer)
- Incident response & change control playbooks
- On-site/secure deployment options (optional)

## One-time onboarding
- ¥1,800,000 (PRO) / ¥4,800,000 (Institutional+) — data mapping, thresholds baseline, audit config

## Notes
- Pilot discount: 8–12 weeks fixed fee (to de-risk adoption)
- Upsell lever: portfolio analytics + LP reporting, governance/audit exports
